newsItems.title: The rally in tech stocks is widening beyond semiconductors and into software
newsItems.summary: The first leg of this rebound belonged to chip stocks. Now, software is catching up quickly.

newsItems.title: AI Chips Used to Be Nvidia’s Game. Now More Winners Are Emerging.
newsItems.summary: Once dominated by Nvidia, the artificial-intelligence boom is now lifting chip stocks from Broadcom and Marvell to Advanced Micro Devices and Intel.

newsItems.title: Down 55% From Its YTD High, Is Super Micro Computer Stock a Buy, Sell, or Hold?
newsItems.summary: While Super Micro Computer stock has swung sharply in recent months, its underlying business performance remains solid.

newsItems.title: 3 Market-Beating Stocks to Target This Week
newsItems.summary: Stocks that outperform the market usually share key traits such as rising sales, expanding margins, and increasing returns on capital. The select few that can do all three for many years are often the ones that make you life-changing money.

newsItems.title: Celestica, Inc. (CLS) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
newsItems.summary: Recently, Zacks.com users have been paying close attention to Celestica (CLS). This makes it worthwhile to examine what the stock has in store.

newsItems.title: Can Jabil's Alliance With Sivers for AI Data Center Boost Its Shares?
newsItems.summary: JBL teams up with Sivers Semiconductors to build 1.6T optical transceivers for AI data centers, aiming for faster, more energy-efficient networking.
